name: Internal Prototype Release Blocker Board v1

blockers.evidence_basis: route registry and sitemap remain non-prototype public surface only
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: public route would expose internal prototype as product
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with validator and decision-log entry

blockers.evidence_basis: output admissibility contract remains internal-only
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: public output generator would emit product-facing results
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with admissibility review

blockers.evidence_basis: prototype charter excludes user input behavior
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: input system would accept user claims or files
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with abuse-case review

blockers.evidence_basis: prototype scope excludes upload workflows
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: upload would introduce ungoverned external content
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with privacy review

blockers.evidence_basis: guardrail model excludes score output
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: scoring would emit verdict-like product behavior
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with output admissibility review

blockers.evidence_basis: public exposure denial policy excludes reports
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: public report would misrepresent internal posture as product output
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with copy boundary review

blockers.evidence_basis: denial policy excludes public benchmark behavior
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: benchmark would imply operational detection capability
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with public safety review

blockers.evidence_basis: fixture policy requires synthetic-only fixtures
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: real-world cases would introduce ungoverned factual risk
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with claim-boundary review

blockers.evidence_basis: prototype boundaries exclude external data connectors
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: external data would bypass synthetic fixture governance
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with source governance review

blockers.evidence_basis: denial policy excludes public explanation layer
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: public explanation would present internal posture as user guidance
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with copy boundary review

blockers.evidence_basis: prototype scope excludes API behavior
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: API would create operational product surface
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with abuse-case review

blockers.evidence_basis: engine boundary charter excludes detector behavior
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: detector/classifier would imply truth or fraud finding product
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with guardrail review

blockers.evidence_basis: output admissibility contract excludes verdict behavior
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: public claim evaluation would emit verdict behavior
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with admissibility review

blockers.evidence_basis: denial policy excludes monetization
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: monetization would create commercial product posture
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with positioning review

blockers.evidence_basis: fixture policy excludes high-risk domain scenarios
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: high-risk domains require separate governed safety review
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit sprint authorization with legal-risk review

blockers.blocker_statement: no public release clearance mechanism yet
blockers.evidence_basis: clearance criteria require future explicit authorization
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: no governed process exists to clear blockers
blockers.clearance_condition: explicit clearance sprint with evidence and validators

blockers.evidence_basis: clearance criteria require public safety review
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: public safety not independently reviewed
blockers.clearance_condition: completed public safety review with documented evidence

blockers.evidence_basis: clearance criteria require abuse-case review
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: abuse pathways not independently reviewed
blockers.clearance_condition: completed abuse-case review with documented evidence

blockers.evidence_basis: clearance criteria require copy boundary review
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: public copy boundaries not independently defined
blockers.clearance_condition: completed copy boundary review with documented evidence

blockers.evidence_basis: clearance criteria require positioning review
blockers.why_it_blocks_public_exposure: positioning could overclaim prototype readiness
blockers.clearance_condition: completed positioning review with documented evidence

non_release_statement: Sprint 81 does not clear any blocker. It creates the blocker board only.
allowed_internal_validation_output: controlled internal release blocker board validation passed
